title: Wound bands by Size (from Damage − Soak)
rule: band width = 5 + Size; wound level = ceil((Damage − Soak) / width). 1=Light, 2=Medium, 3=Heavy, 4=Incapacitating, 5+=Dead.
notes: Penalties are cumulative with each other and with Fatigue, applied to all rolls/totals EXCEPT Soak. Incapacitated → two Recovery rolls/day; a 0-or-less roll kills.
